# HR Employee First Name and Two Last Names

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:e3ad9ca8445db84cea2f6b86336a239e2277e208c08820c7e4ea30ad9d259fe8
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows you to add firstname and lastnames (Father an Mother Last Name) in employee form,
and concatenate both in name field.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. Go to *Employees*
2. On the employee form view you will have 3 separate fields, one for Firstname, second for Lastname, both required and Mother's Last Name (optional).

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_lastnames.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._inverse_name
documentation: Try to revert the effect of {method}`._compute_name`.

methods.name: odoo.addons.hr_employee_lastnames.models.hr_employee.HrEmployee._install_employee_lastnames
documentation:
Save names correctly in the database.
Before installing the module, field `name` contains all full names.
When installing it, this method parses those names and saves them
correctly into the database. This can be called later too if needed.
